arts.ttl: “He will not be absolved” – Erik ten Hag thrashed for making ‘inexplicable’ decision at Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester United witnessed another mistake involving Andre Onana against Lyon on Thursday night. It cost the Red Devils the game, as the French side picked up a vital draw in the first leg of the Europa League quarter-finals. arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates from St James' Park as Man United take on Newcastle United in the Premier League this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana axed by Man United for Newcastle United clash amid Bruno Fernandes rest decision
arts.sum: Onana, a £47.2million in July 2023 from Inter Milan, has started 69 successive Premier League matches, yet head coach Ruben Amorim will start Bayindir at St James' Park instead. Amorim may choose to rest a number of other players, including captain Bruno Fernandes.

arts.sum: Amorin initially insisted he would be sticking by the Manchester United goalkeeper

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim to hand Harry Amass, 18, his FIRST Premier League start at Newcastle - while Andre Onana is left at home by the Man United boss after Europa League horror show
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY NATHAN SALT: Harry Amass is set to make his first Premier League start as Ruben Amorim shuffles his pack for Manchester United's trip to Newcastle today.

arts.ttl: Wor Flags announce Newcastle United match day plans after Eddie Howe calls
arts.sum: Newcastle United fan group Wor Flags have responded to calls to make a late change to their flag display in light of Eddie Howe's hospital admission. It read: "Eddie Howe will miss Newcastle United’s Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday due to illness.

arts.ttl: Manager directly addresses Manchester United talk for player – €40m not enough
arts.sum: Earlier this month, Manchester United were linked with a move for Como’s Assane Diao. The winger has impressed for the Italian side since his arrival in Serie A, scoring six times in all competitions.
